## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Link related issues. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Code quality / tests / documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] I understand the code I am submitting and can explain how it works.
- [ ] Local `script/lint-check` and `script/test` pass.
- [ ] I have manually verified the changed behavior in Home Assistant (see **Testing** below).
- [ ] New behavior has tests; bugfixes include regression tests where applicable.
- [ ] No commented-out dead code.
- [ ] If `manifest.json` changed: version bumped and `CHANGELOG.md` updated.
- [ ] If user-facing strings changed: `translations/` updated.
- [ ] If dependencies changed: version pin updated with changelog link in this description.
- [ ] GitHub Actions checks are green (CI runs automatically on fork PRs; mark **Ready for review** if this was a draft).

### AI-assisted contributions

- [ ] AI tools were used in this PR (Copilot, Cursor, ChatGPT, etc.).
- [ ] I have reviewed every AI-generated line and can explain it without relying on the tool.

<!-- If you did not use AI tools, leave both boxes unchecked. -->
